response.overview: Imelda, a seemingly ordinary woman, is forced into a dangerous situation when her father, Don Ruben, a respected businessman, is kidnapped by a criminal group demanding company shares as ransom.  With no knowledge of these assets, Imelda must uncover the hidden side of her father’s business while racing against time to save his life. As she digs deeper, she discovers dark secrets that challenge everything she believed about her family.  Surrounded by danger and deception, Imelda must decide who to trust and how far she is willing to go.  In a world of hidden truths and moral conflict, saving her father may come at a cost she never imagined.
response.title: El Secuestro De Mi Padre
